Ordinances restricting fossil fuel infrastructure development raise constitutional questions regarding regulatory takings and due process.

Write about waste management

Waste minimization plans must be developed and implemented by large quantity generators of hazardous materials.
Administrative agencies possess authority to issue cease and desist orders for unauthorized waste disposal activities.
Transportation of hazardous waste materials necessitates manifest documentation and adherence to Department of Transportation regulations.
Yearly reporting obligations require waste facilities to document volumes handled, compliance status, and environmental monitoring results.
Organic waste diversion mandates require large-scale food waste generators to utilize composting or anaerobic digestion.
Natural resource damages may be assessed against parties responsible for waste-related injuries to publicly owned environmental resources.
Natural resource damages may be recovered from responsible parties for injury to publicly owned environmental resources.
Ownership of contaminated property does not automatically establish liability without proof of causation or contribution.

Write about labor rights

Drug testing programs must comply with statutory limitations and procedural requirements.
Notice requirements for plant closures and mass layoffs are mandated under the Worker Adjustment Retraining Act.
Documentation of workplace violations should be maintained to support potential legal claims or regulatory investigations.
Termination of employment must not violate public policy or constitute wrongful discharge under applicable state law.
Xenophobic conduct in the workplace violates anti-discrimination laws and creates hostile work environment liability.
Non-compete agreements face increasing scrutiny regarding enforceability and reasonable geographic and temporal scope.
Confidentiality provisions in employment agreements cannot prevent employees from cooperating with government investigations.
Discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, or disability is prohibited in all aspects of employment under federal law.
